title: Restaurant Gift Card
description: Looking for options to gift a personalized restaurant gift card for a last‑minute occasion, including price tiers, customization, and delivery details.
narrative: The user is seeking convenient, personalized restaurant‑gift‑card solutions suitable for occasions such as anniversaries or holidays. Relevant information should enumerate the available card formats, pricing structure (e.g., €25, €30, champagne options), personalization details (custom message, recipient name), and delivery methods (instant email, postage for last‑minute orders). Examples that fall outside the restaurant-gift‑card context—other gift‑card types, unrelated experiences, or generic gift ideas—should be treated as irrelevant.

title: Dog-Friendly Val di Vara Trips
description: I’m planning a vacation in Val di Vara with my dog and need a guide to dog‑accepted accommodations, activities, and special services.
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, up‑to‑date resource that lists hotels, agriturismos, B&Bs and other lodging in Val di Vara that explicitly accept pets, along with any special dog‑friendly amenities (e.g., dog beach, walking routes, veterinary services).  Relevance is judged by the presence of concrete, location‑specific listings, descriptions of dog‑approved facilities and activities, pricing information, and crew‑recommended itineraries for dog owners.  Content that mentions general travel information without a dog focus, or provides vague or non‑specific “dog friendly” claims, should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Hybrid Cost Comparison
description: Which low‑cost hybrid family sedans are available and how do they compare in terms of technology, price, and emissions?
narrative: The user wants to evaluate affordable hybrid sedans for family use, focusing on models that use proven hybrid technology (e.g., similar to the Toyota Prius), their purchase price, and the expected CO₂ savings. Relevant sources must discuss low‑priced, family‑sized hybrids, comparative specs, and cost‑benefit or emissions data.

title: Thermomix Blanquette Prep
description: How can I cook a traditional blanquette de veau using a Thermomix, including ingredients, steps, and optional variations?
narrative: The user is a home cook looking for a faithful, easy-to-follow Thermomix recipe that replicates the classic French blanquette de veau. Relevant documents should provide a full ingredient list (veal shoulder, carrots, onions, wine, broth…), precise Thermomix settings (temperature, speed, duration), clear step‑by‑step instructions (sautéing, simmering, sauce thickening), and optional substitutions (chicken broth, lemon juice, different sauces). Serving suggestions with rice, pasta or potatoes and any community‑tested tweaks that preserve the dish’s traditional white sauce character should also be included. Items lacking these details or not focusing on a Thermomix‑centric preparation should be considered irrelevant.

title: Custom Car Cover
description: What options are available for custom protective car covers for my vintage car?
narrative: The user wants to select a custom or semi‑custom protective cover for a vintage or rare vehicle, both interior and exterior, and needs details on materials (lycra, cotton, PVC, scratch‑resistant), customization (logo printing, coloured piping, rear‑view mirror pockets), sizing, color choices, price ranges, suitability for indoor or outdoor use, and the ordering and shipping process. Relevance should cover these specifications, model compatibility, and the associated costs and customization options.

title: Aluminum Barge Compliance
description: Which commercial barges built by A.F. Theriault & Jr. use aluminum and comply with Transport Canada Small Vessel Regulations?
narrative: A procurement officer or marine engineer is looking for vessels that meet both construction‑material and regulatory criteria. Relevant documents are those that state the barges are made of aluminum and explicitly mention compliance with Transport Canada’s Small Vessel Regulations.

title: PSA Engineering Recruitment
description: Why did PSA recruit former PSA experts from Stellantis in early 2022 for its engineering directorate, and what roles will they play?
narrative: The user is looking for context on PSA Group (now Stellantis) hiring two ex‑PSA engineers for its engineering directorate in early 2022—specifically the strategic motivations behind the move, the precise positions and responsibilities the new hires will hold, how this fits into Stellantis’ broader push toward new technologies such as electrification and autonomous driving, and what implications it has for the industry’s response to chip shortages and market dynamics. Documents should discuss Reuters coverage, Stellantis/PSA announcements, and industry analysis that explain the reasoning, roles, and strategic fit of these hires.

title: Film-Based Teaching
description: Which films and film segments are best suited for teaching English at different grade levels, and how can they be integrated with specific grammatical or thematic objectives?
narrative: The user seeks a curated list of films with brief pedagogical annotations, including recommended grade levels, learning objectives, and suggested lesson activities, to support curriculum design across primary to secondary English classes.

title: Returned Expat Benefits
description: I need to understand the steps required to secure unemployment benefits and health insurance when returning to France after living abroad.
narrative: The user is an expatriate who has come back to France and wants a clear, step‑by‑step guide on the documents and procedures needed to (1) register with Pôle emploi, (2) collect and present the U‑1 or U‑2 portable forms, (3) apply for and maintain sick‑care coverage, and (4) navigate any eligibility constraints based on employment history abroad. Documents that qualify must explain the relevant agencies, required forms, deadlines, and specific conditions that affect both unemployment entitlements and health insurance.

title: AXA Internship Compensation
description: What are the salary and benefits for interns at AXA?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about the compensation, allowances, and benefits for internship positions at AXA, including salary structure, transport reimbursement, and access to company facilities, to decide if the role meets their financial expectations. Relevance requires documents describing AXA internship remuneration, transport support, and other perks; documents addressing other careers or generic bank accounts are irrelevant.

title: Electric model fuel efficiency
description: Which Nissan electric car model consumes the least energy per kilometre, and how does it compare with the Dacia Spring in terms of range, charging time and overall cost?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, data‑driven comparison between the most efficient Nissan electric vehicle (e.g., the Nissan Leaf 2) and the Dacia Spring, focusing on real‑world energy consumption figures, WLTP‑rated range, charging infrastructure compatibility, and ownership cost. Relevant documents should provide objective metrics such as kWh/100 km, 80‑to‑80 % fast‑charging times, and total cost of ownership (including tax incentives). Contextual information about the vehicles’ charging options (home wallbox, quick charging stations) and maintenance savings is also desirable.

title: Organic Potato Selection
description: Which potato varieties are best for an organic vegetable garden, considering disease resistance and culinary uses?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison of organic potato varieties suitable for a home garden, prioritizing resistance to common diseases such as downy mildew, silver scab, and rhizoctonia, as well as suitability for various cooking methods (e.g., steaming, frying, baking). Relevant documents should provide yield, maturity time, storage capacity, and recommended uses for each variety.

title: ASA Participation Mapping
description: Which ASA‑classified participants competed in the 2012 Ain‑Jura Rally Group FN/4, and what were their sector status results?
narrative: The user wants to cross‑reference the ASA ESCA classification list with the official rally results for Group FN/4 of the 2012 Ain‑Jura Rally. Relevance is determined by documents that contain both participant identifiers from the classification table and their corresponding sector status (positions) in the rally result grid.

title: Time-Space Quest
description: Where can I find the four hourglasses lost by the Time Goddess in the Duo: Time and Space game, and how long will the quest last?
narrative: The user is a player looking for the four lost hourglasses that grant powers to the Time Goddess in the Duo: Time and Space game. They need a step‑by‑step guide to locate each hourglass, specifying the exact in‑game locations or puzzles, any required items or conditions, and an estimate of the total time needed to complete the quest—including any events that might affect the “time” component. Relevance is determined by how accurately the answer describes the quest mechanics, the hourglass locations, and a realistic time expectation, while providing actionable tips that a player can follow to finish the quest.

title: Legend of Korra Availability
description: Where can I watch all seasons of The Legend of Korra, and are there any reliable links or services that provide complete episodes in French or English?
narrative: The user seeks information about obtaining complete episodes of The Legend of Korra, specifically looking for working URLs, recommended streaming or download services, and language options (French dubbed or English). Relevance criteria include documents that mention specific episode links, platform availability, discussion of full season coverage, and language preferences.

title: Life Insurance Availability
description: Does the organization sell life insurance?
narrative: The user is specifically asking whether the organization offers life insurance products. Relevant documents should confirm the sale of life insurance, reference the affiliated insurer (e.g., TD Life Insurance Company), and provide details such as policy options or contact information. Documents that only discuss unrelated topics or provide generic insurance commentary without addressing the sale are not relevant.

title: Territorial Transformation Training
description: Seeking professional development sessions focused on territorial transformation, biomimicry, and sustainable local anchorage.
narrative: The user wants detailed information on master‑classes, workshops, and advisory programs offered by institutions such as Territory Lab, Biovallée, and Scop NovaSens. The relevance criteria include: 1) Target audience (civil servants, local officials, managers, consultants, students); 2) Content focus on territorial culture, transformation, and biomimicry; 3) Duration and format of the training (half‑day to multi‑day, field visits, collective intelligence); and 4) Practical applicability to regional development and organizational anchorage.

title: Charlotte Potato Harvest & Recipe
description: When is the optimal time to harvest Charlotte potatoes and what cooking method is best for them?
narrative: The user is a home gardener who wants precise guidance on harvesting the semi‑precocious Charlotte potato variety. They need the exact harvest window (days from planting, leaf wilt indicators), recommended weather conditions (dry, sunny), and storage tips (dark, cool, dry). Additionally, they want a detailed recipe for a crushed potato dish that pairs well with the crop, including ingredients, preparation steps, and optional variations. Relevance is judged by the inclusion of specific harvest dates, environmental cues, preservation instructions, and a comprehensive cooking method.

title: Art at OTRE Congress
description: Which speeches and debates during the OTRE Congress discuss or include references to art exhibitions, particularly photographic works?
narrative: The user wants to locate documents from the OTRE congress program that mention artistic components such as Christian Julia’s photographic exhibitions, including dates, speakers, and the nature of the artistic discussions. Relevance requires explicit reference to both the OTRE congress and art/photography, occurring in or near venues like Espace Charenton or Meaux, and will be judged by presence of these topics within the same text.

title: Bordeaux Energy Choice
description: Which electricity and gas suppliers in Bordeaux offer the most cost‑effective and environmentally friendly options for a typical family?
narrative: User seeks a comprehensive comparison of electricity and gas suppliers in Bordeaux, evaluating annual savings, renewable energy proportions, customer support availability, and constraints like the gas distribution monopoly, to decide on a contract that best fits a typical family's usage and sustainability preferences.

title: KIA Milestones
description: What were the major milestones in KIA's corporate history that led to its position as the fourth largest automotive manufacturer?
narrative: The user seeks a concise, fact‑based timeline of KIA’s evolution, including key dates, product introductions, plant openings, strategic partnerships, branding efforts, and awards that shaped its global growth.  Relevance requires documents that provide specific events with dates, context, and evidence of impact on the company’s market position and reputation.

title: France Centre Location
description: Where is the exact geographical centre of France and which sources confirm its location?
narrative: The user seeks precise coordinates and authoritative references for the geographical centre of France, aiming to distinguish between official claims (e.g., IGN designation) and historical calculations (e.g., Joanne), and expects relevance to include documented geodetic data and source citations.

title: Family Stay Istanbul
description: Which Istanbul hotels near Taksim offer child‑friendly amenities and convenient booking for families?
narrative: The user wants to locate an Istanbul hotel close to Taksim that provides child-friendly facilities—such as special menus, snack options, child‑friendly rooms—and a smooth, easy booking process. Relevance is determined by the presence of child‑specific amenities, proximity to Taksim, and clear booking procedures.

title: Nantes car parking
description: Where can I find affordable, secure parking options near Nantes railway station, including valet and aerial/underground facilities, and what are the rates and operating hours?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on parking at Nantes station, aiming to compare price ranges, operating hours, coverage (covered vs uncovered), proximity to station entrances, security features, wheelchair accessibility, and available valet or rental services. Relevance hinges on documents that provide specific details on location categories (North, South 1‑3, aerial/underground), cost estimates for various durations, and service schedules, as well as any nearby car‑rental options that facilitate vehicle pickup and return at or near the station.

title: BF15 Potato Cooking Guide
description: What are the optimal cooking methods and health benefits for the BF15 potato variety?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the BF15 potato that covers its cultivation characteristics, ideal cooking techniques (steaming, baking, boiling, etc.), nutritional profile, and suitable recipe applications. Relevant content must detail the timing and conditions for each cooking method, highlight how BF15’s firm flesh retains its structure, discuss its vitamin and mineral content, and suggest which dishes (e.g., salads, gratins, purées) best showcase the potato’s properties. The answer should compare BF15 to other varieties where applicable and provide practical tips for selecting, preparing, and cooking this specific potato type.

title: Wine-Castle Route
description: Seeking recommendations for a travel route that includes Beaune's vineyards and Chambord Castle, with highlights, transportation, and key experiences.
narrative: The user wants a concise itinerary that blends Beaune’s wine culture and Chambord’s Renaissance architecture. Relevant documents should detail key landmarks (e.g., Hospices de Beaune, Chateau’s double‑helix staircase), best transportation options (regional trains, bus lines, car routes), optimal visiting times, local dining or tasting spots, and practical tips for minimizing travel time between the two sites.

title: DOFLEX Track Glue Usage
description: What are the best practices and instructions for using DOFLEX track glue from Extrabox?
narrative: The user is a model railway hobbyist looking to apply DOFLEX track glue correctly.  Relevant answers must provide step‑by‑step procedural details, reference to the instructional video supplied by Extrabox, safety precautions, recommended installation techniques, and links to the specific Extrabox product.  Content that merely lists other shop items, unrelated products, or general household tips is considered irrelevant.

title: Clio MK2 Window Switch
description: Where can I find a front window switch for a Renault Clio MK2 (2001‑2006) passenger model in white?
narrative: The user needs a genuine or compatible front window switch for a Renault Clio MK2 from the 2001‑2006 production window. Relevance is determined by documents that provide part identifiers (e.g., ‘NSF Front Window Switch White’), model compatibility, year range, condition status, price, and purchase method. Additional useful information includes shipping details, availability, and seller contact info.

title: Luxury Wedding Cars
description: I want to find affordable luxury cars for renting for a wedding, including locations and pricing.
narrative: The user wants to compare luxury car rental options for wedding services, focusing on price, location, vehicle type, and availability in areas such as Cote d'Azur, Berlin, and other European cities.

title: Used Car & Rental
description: I need to check a secondhand car’s registration details before buying it and compare that with renting a car in Lanzarote.
narrative: The user is preparing to purchase a secondhand vehicle and wants to thoroughly verify the registration certificate—confirming fields such as registration number, first registration date, VIN, owner name, vehicle make, model, and weights—while also evaluating the cost and conditions of renting a car in Lanzarote, including pickup locations, fees for young and senior drivers, and discount codes. Relevance requires documents containing detailed registration certificate content, legal checks, and rental car terms; documents lacking these specific details or unrelated to the purchase/lease context should be excluded.

title: Lincoln’s Labor Ideology
description: Which labor and socialist aspects of Abraham Lincoln are omitted from Spielberg’s film and mainstream U.S. narratives?
narrative: The user wants detailed evidence of Lincoln’s engagement with labor movements, his admiration for socialist ideas, his support for workers’ rights, and critiques of the film’s neglect of these themes. Documents should include primary statements, scholarly work, or modern critiques that highlight his labor stance and estimate the film’s omissions. Non‑analytical or purely promotional content should be excluded.

title: Motorcycle Crash Report
description: How can I obtain the official police report and legal guidance for a fatal motorcycle accident in Emumclaw, Washington?
narrative: The user read a news article about a motorcyclist who died after crashing into a guardrail on Southeast 400th Way in Emumclaw, WA, and wants to access the official police report for that incident as well as information on potential legal remedies or representation. Relevance should include documents that provide or discuss the police report, official accident summaries, and legal resources or firm statements for injury or wrongful death claims related to motorcycle accidents in Washington.

title: Fayard Concert Details
description: What information can I find about the Fayard in Concert event hosted by Aprodis Production at Salle Saint François in Marlens on Festiv.net?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive event specifics—date, time, performer list, venue capacity, ticket pricing, schedules, and audience reviews—for the Fayard in Concert musical event. Relevance is confined to documents that provide verifiable, fact-based details related to this particular concert and its context within the Festiv.net platform.

title: RAYNEAU Loiret ancestors
description: Retrieve all birth, marriage, and death records for individuals bearing the surname RAYNEAU in the Loiret department between 1700 and 1850.
narrative: The user is conducting genealogical research for the RAYNEAU family line in the Loiret area and needs primary source entries (name, date, event type, location) falling within the specified time range. Relevant documents should be limited to records from Loiret (Centre‑Val de Loire) and exclude non‑RAYNEAU entries or records from other departments.

title: EDF Energy Savings Premium
description: How can a company qualify for and apply to the EDF Energy Savings Premium to reduce its energy costs and increase asset value?
narrative: The user is a small- or medium‑sized enterprise owner looking for detailed information on the EDF Energy Savings Premium. They want to know the eligibility criteria (building type, sector, project scale), the process of identifying suitable energy‑efficiency projects, how to engage an EDF contact and partner professional, the financial assistance stages, and the expected benefits in terms of bill reduction and asset valuation. Relevance is determined by documents that describe the programme’s requirements, application steps, and real‑world examples of energy‑saving projects funded by EDF.

title: Register Anonymously
description: How can I register for the police message board while staying anonymous?
narrative: The user wants detailed, step‑by‑step instructions for signing up on the police message board. They care about preserving anonymity and the user must understand how email verification is handled, what information is required, and how the system protects usernames and email addresses. Relevant documents will be those that explain the registration process, anonymizing options, and privacy assurances.

title: Weyde Instant History
description: Which primary sources document Edith Weyde’s invention of instant photography and its subsequent influence on the New55 film project?
narrative: The user seeks in-depth, scholarly references on Edith Weyde’s contributions, technical details of her 1930s instant process, and how those insights informed New55’s 4×5 instant film development, excluding commercially biased marketing materials.

title: Diabetic Breakfast Quiche
description: What breakfast quiche recipes are suitable for patients with type 2 diabetes, focusing on low‑carbohydrate and low‑sodium options?
narrative: The user is a type‑2 diabetic seeking a breakfast quiche that aligns with diabetes dietary guidelines. Relevance requires content that explicitly addresses meal composition, ingredient substitutions, portion sizes, and nutritional details (carbohydrates, sodium, fat) that help control blood glucose and blood pressure.

title: Parking Skills
description: What techniques can improve my parking performance in the Manual Gearbox Car Parking game on Android?
narrative: The user seeks specific strategies for mastering realistic parking and manual driving challenges within the Multiplayer Manual Gearbox Car Parking game, including gear shift timing, vehicle control differences across cars, and useful in-game features such as tutorials or practice levels.

title: Youth Mobility Training
description: What training programs, job opportunities and relocation services are available for individuals under 30 moving to a new city in France?
narrative: The user is a young professional planning a relocation for career advancement. They seek relevant training options (e.g., MOOCs, certification courses), job listings in their target municipality, tools for presenting their profile (video CV, digital business card), and services that assist with the move (Mobiville, SMS job alerts, local job portals). Relevance criteria include documents that describe online employment services, training supports, digital CV tools, relocation guidance, and job search aids tailored to users under 30.

title: SFR Nevers Outage
description: Where can I find the current status of SFR service outages in Nevers, including affected postal codes and latest updates?
narrative: A resident or business owner in Nevers seeks reliable, real‑time information about SFR telecommunication service disruptions. Relevance depends on up‑to‑date outage logs, geographic specificity (e.g., postal codes such as 58000), official SFR announcements, status of resolutions, and available contact channels for support.

title: Oil Stove Cost & Safety
description: While planning to use an oil stove, how do the cost, safety, and health impacts of lampant oil vs. CLAM oil compare to electric heating?
narrative: The user is evaluating whether an oil heater is a viable alternative to electric heating. Relevance criteria include detailed cost per kWh, aromatics content limits, toxicity and CO risk, ventilation requirements, and maintenance recommendations.

title: French Guiana Election 2017
description: Retrieve constituency‑level results for French Guiana’s 2017 parliamentary elections, including candidate vote counts, percentages, turnout, and qualification status.
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive breakdown of the 2017 parliamentary elections in French Guiana. Useful documents will provide data for each constituency (or district), listing every candidate, the number of votes received, their vote share in percentages, the turnout rate, which candidates qualified for the second round, and which were eliminated. Relevance is judged by the presence of this detailed, constituency‑specific election information; reports limited to national‐level summaries or unrelated content (e.g., car rental listings) are not relevant.

title: Urban Potato Preservation
description: What are effective methods to grow and store potatoes in a small urban garden lacking a cellar?
narrative: The user is an urban homeowner with limited garden space and no traditional cellar for storage. They need practical guidance on how to plant potatoes—considering early planting, proper spacing, use of mounded beds or cardboard, and mulch to control greening—and on how to preserve the harvested tubers once the season ends. Suitable preservation options may include dry storage, salting, or other techniques that work in confined, indoor, or container settings. The relevance is focused on space‑constrained growing, frost‑tolerant timing, greening prevention, and accessible storage methods that do not rely on a cellar.

title: SumUp Vouchers Restrictions
description: Which merchants are prohibited from offering SumUp purchase vouchers, and why are they excluded?
narrative: A merchant wants to know the specific business activity types that SumUp disallows due to fraud‑prevention regulations, and would like the answer to include a list of restricted e‑shop categories and brief explanations of the regulatory reasons.
